calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-13-2025 Vacated

Motion To Compel Plaintiff Henri Guite'S Discovery Responses, For Facts To Be Deemed Admitted, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-22-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: DEFENDANT MARRIOTT INTERNATIONAL, INC.'s Motion To Compel Plaintiff Henri Guite'S Discovery Responses, For Facts To Be Deemed Admitted, And For Monetary Sanctions.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. No opposition filed; motion granted. The facts in the RFAs will be deemed admitted unless objection free responses are served at or before the hearing. Responses to the interrogatories and RFPDs shall be served by August 16, 2024. Sanctions of $500 awarded to Defendant.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2024 Set For Trial On Mar-10-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-16-2024 Continued To Jul-10-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
